title: Green earthquake (Magnitude 4.6M, Depth:10km) in South Of Panama 19/06/2026 00:07 UTC, No people affected in 100km.
summary: On 6/19/2026 12:07:07 AM, an earthquake occurred in South Of Panama potentially affecting No people affected in 100km. The earthquake had Magnitude 4.6M, Depth:10km.
recommended_action: Nicht reflexhaft reagieren. Quelle sichern, Kontext prüfen, Risiko dokumentieren und Gegenmaßnahme vorbereiten.

title: Upcoming deprecation of Opus 4.6 (fast)
summary: We will deprecate Opus 4.6 (fast) across all GitHub Copilot experiences (including Copilot Chat, inline edits, ask and agent modes, and code completions), on June 29th, 2026: Model Deprecation date… The post Upcoming deprecation of Opus 4.6 (fast) appeared first on The GitHub Blog .
recommended_action: Beobachten, Quelle sichern und bei Wiederholung erneut bewerten.
